data.content:
Validated implementation on branch foolery-44f1 at commit aa1951bc2f01.

What is implemented
- Existing branch commit constrains the ReTakes row title width to prevent the view from widening its centered layout shell.
- Existing shared layout keeps the header/page shell aligned, with scrollbar gutter stabilization present in src/app/globals.css.

Verification
- Browser validation against the knot worktree dev server on http://127.0.0.1:3001 measured stable header positions across Queues, ReTakes, and Diagnostics: header left 39.625px, Foolery left 56.625px, header row right edge 1528.375px.
- No horizontal movement was observed in the top navigation row when switching between those views.
- Sanity gates passed in the knot worktree after bun install --frozen-lockfile:
  - bun run lint
  - bunx tsc --noEmit
  - bun run test
  - bun run build

Repo state
- git status is clean.
- No additional code changes were required in this session because the implementation branch already satisfied the acceptance criteria.
